args: let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command)||'';if(/yarn (add|remove|up|upgrade)|npm (install|uninstall|update)/i.test(cmd)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'package.json may have changed - run /dep-sync to update TECH_STACK.md.'})+String.fromCharCode(10));}}catch(e){}});
